title: Which Keanu Reeves Character Are You, Actually?
dek: Eight roles, eight totally different energies — answer honestly and find out which side of Keanu you're secretly channeling.

quiz.intro: No wrong answers here, just vibes — pick the option that sounds most like something you'd actually say, then go test your movie brain on Flickle, the daily movie-guessing game.

questions.question: Alarm bells are going off — literal or metaphorical crisis mode. What's your move?

answers.text: Stay weirdly calm and start bending the rules of reality until it makes sense
Say almost nothing, then handle it with terrifying efficiency
Panic for a second, then somehow talk everyone into believing it'll be 'most excellent'
Grip the wheel, stay locked in, and improvise a plan under pressure

questions.question: Someone close to you is wronged. How far are you willing to go?

answers.text: There is no 'far enough.' I will end everyone involved, calmly
I'll write a song about it that changes the course of history
I'll stay on mission until the threat is neutralized, no matter the personal cost
I'll strike a bargain with hell itself if that's what it takes
Time-traveling through history with my best friend to collect historical figures
White-knuckling through an unexpected emergency that somehow becomes a date
Chain-smoking on a rooftop, arguing with an angel or a demon
Working way too late trying to win an impossible case

questions.question: What's your biggest weakness, if you're honest?

answers.text: I make split-second calls and don't always think two steps ahead
I've made deals I probably shouldn't have
Ambition makes me blind to red flags
I've been counted out before, so I second-guess myself

questions.question: How would your friends actually describe you?

answers.text: Chaotic, sarcastic, and somehow always right about the supernatural stuff
Sharp, hungry for success, and a little too good at arguing
The comeback story nobody saw coming
Intense, a little reckless, always chasing the next rush
Win at all costs — just watch what it costs you
Second chances are earned on the field, not given
Chase the feeling, even if it's dangerous
'There is no spoon.'

questions.question: A total stranger needs help. What do you do?

answers.text: Give them a real shot when nobody else would
Get way more emotionally involved than my job actually requires
Decide their fight is now my fight, permanently
Quietly handle it and disappear before they can thank me

questions.question: What would finally make you snap?

answers.text: Realizing I care more about them than the badge
Being told the world I know isn't even real
Hurting something I love that can't defend itself
Being told my band isn't going to change the world
They're a construct — I can bend or break them once I understand them
I follow a strict code, even in the middle of chaos
Rules are, like, a suggestion, dude
I respect procedure until lives are on the line, then I improvise

questions.question: Last one: what's actually driving you deep down?

answers.text: Grief, love, and an unshakable code of honor
Genuine, uncomplicated love for my friends and the world
A need to protect people even when it terrifies me
Redemption I'm not sure I even deserve

results.name: Neo
results.subtitle: The Matrix (1999)
results.description: You're the chosen-one type — quiet on the surface, but once you realize what you're capable of, there's no going back to your old life. You question everything, and honestly, you're usually right to.

results.name: John Wick
results.subtitle: John Wick (2014)
results.description: You don't talk much, but when you're pushed too far there is nothing that will stop you. Loyalty and grief run deep in you, and you'd burn down an entire criminal underworld over something — or someone — you loved.

results.name: Ted Logan
results.subtitle: Bill & Ted's Excellent Adventure (1989)
results.description: You're the most wholesome person in any room, and somehow it works out for everyone around you. You may not have all the answers, but your heart — and your loyalty to your friends — is never in question.

results.name: Jack Traven
results.subtitle: Speed (1994)
results.description: You're the one everyone wants around during an actual emergency — calm, decisive, and weirdly good under pressure that would flatten anyone else. You improvise fast and you don't panic, even when the stakes are absurd.

results.name: John Constantine
results.subtitle: Constantine (2005)
results.description: You're a little chaotic, a little cynical, and fighting battles most people can't even see. You're not exactly a saint, but you're fighting for redemption anyway — on your own terms.

results.name: Kevin Lomax
results.subtitle: The Devil's Advocate (1997)
results.description: Ambitious, sharp, and a little too good at winning arguments — you chase success hard enough that you sometimes miss the warning signs right in front of you. Just make sure you know exactly who you're working for.

results.name: Shane Falco
results.subtitle: The Replacements (2000)
results.description: You're the ultimate underdog comeback story. Written off once, you're determined to prove everyone wrong, and you'd rather rally a team nobody believes in than coast with people who never doubted you in the first place.

results.name: Johnny Utah
results.subtitle: Point Break (1991)
results.description: You're intense, a little reckless, and chase the rush wherever it takes you — even undercover into a life you were only supposed to be observing. Just watch out: you tend to get in way too deep, way too fast.
